Every Box Contains

Curated for the devoted

Every tier includes the same core collection of premium items — each one chosen to immerse you completely in the world of your chosen character.

01
人

Your Character

Choose your favourite anime character and receive an exclusive piece centred entirely on them — curated at your tier level.

02
絵

Anime Poster

A premium art-print poster of your chosen character. Gallery-quality, ready to frame — sized to command the wall.

03
巻

Original Manga Volume

An authentic Japanese-language manga volume from the series — the original text, the original art. A true collector's piece.

04
帳

Vunagi Notebook

A premium Vunagi&co branded notebook — your journal for the 6-month challenge ahead. Built for reflection and intention.

05
誌

10-Page Character Magazine

A bespoke editorial magazine breaking down your character's philosophy, mindset and values — and how to apply them to your real life.

06
道

6-Month Life Challenge

A structured 6-month development programme. Monthly missions drawn from your character's arc to reshape how you move through the world.

The Development Programme

The 6-Month Character Challenge

Your favourite anime character didn't become legendary by accident. They trained. They failed. They evolved. Now it's your turn — guided by the same principles that shaped them.

Each month brings a new mission drawn from your character's story arc and applied directly to your real goals, your real world, your real life.

01

Choose Your Character

Select the anime character whose philosophy resonates deepest. Your entire box — and 6-month challenge — is built entirely around them.

02

Study Their Philosophy

Your 10-page magazine deconstructs how they think, act and overcome — then maps it directly onto your modern life.

03

Accept the Monthly Missions

Six months. Six missions. Each one drawn from your character's arc and designed to stretch you in a different direction.

04

Document Your Flow

Use your Vunagi notebook to track the journey — reflections, breakthroughs, and the slow transformation taking shape.

05

Become the Character

By month six, you won't just know your character. You'll have lived their principles — and built a version of yourself worth being.
